# Cost Per Night Calculator

Published By: [Calculator Academy](https://calculator.academy/author/calculatoracademy/)

Last Updated: March 25, 2026

Reviewed By: **Scott Hickam**(MBA, Finance)

![Image 3: Headshot of Scott Hickam](https://calculator.academy/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/c1KYLMxZzWYxn2mgn_45OK6y48Jxyz6yS90r7eKXtR4pteTZNITmupL5z3UDmzmkAT-1.jpg)
**Scott Hickam** has a Masters in Business Administration and 8 Years of Experience in the financial sector. He’s our go-to reviewer for all things finance. [Full Bio](https://calculator.academy/author/scott-hickam/)

Enter the total length of stay, in nights, and the total cost of the stay into the calculator to determine the cost per night. This calculator can also determine the total cost or number of nights given the other variables are known.

## Cost per Night Calculator

Total price to nightly cost

Nightly rate plus fees

Enter your total stay cost to see the true price per night and per guest.

Total trip price ($) Number of nights Number of guests (optional) 

Total trip cost:

Average cost per night:

Cost per person per night:

Start from a nightly rate, add cleaning, taxes, and fees to see the real nightly price.

Nightly rate before fees ($) Number of nights Cleaning fee per stay ($) Other flat fees per stay ($) Taxes and percentage-based fees (%) Number of guests (optional) 

Total trip cost:

Average cost per night (all-in):

Cost per person per night:

## Cost Per Night Formula

The following equation is used to calculate the Cost Per Night.

C P N=T C/N CPN = TC / N CPN=TC/N

*   Where CPN is the cost per night ($/night)
*   TC is the total cost ($)
*   N is the number of nights staying at the location

To calculate the cost per night, add together the total cost of the trip plus taxes, then divide by the length of stay in nights.

## What is a Cost Per Night?

Definition:

Cost per night is a way to define the average cost of staying at a hotel, or other location like an Airbnb, for one night. Typically the longer you stay at a place, the better the rate per night.

## How to Calculate Cost Per Night?

Example Problem:

The following example outlines the steps and information needed to calculate the Cost Per Night.

First, determine the length of the stay. For this example, a couple is taking a vacation on a 7-night trip to the tropics.

Next, determine the total cost per night. Adding together the entire trip cost comes out to $10,000.00.

Finally, calculate the cost per night using the formula above:

CPN = TC / #N

CPN = $10,000.00 / 7

CPN = $1,428.5 /night

Cookies and these tools do not contain any information that personally identifies a user, but personal information that would be stored about you may be linked to the information stored in and obtained from them. This information would be used and shared for Analytics, Ad Serving, Interest Based Advertising, among other purposes.
